{"author": null, "closed_at": null, "collaborating_teams": null, "collaborating_users": null, "created_at": null, "credits": [], "credits_detailed": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-45284", "cvss": {"score": 4.6, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:L/UI:R/S:U/C:L/I:L/A:L"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 4.6, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:L/UI:R/S:U/C:L/I:L/A:L"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}}, "cwe_ids": ["CWE-284"], "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-284", "name": "Improper Access Control"}], "description": "### Impact

An improper check allowed users that where provided by LDAP to still authenticate towards user OIDC after they where deleted.

### Patches

It is recommended that the user_oidc app Server is upgraded to 8.4.0

### Workarounds

* Disable app user_oidc

### References

* [HackerOne](https://hackerone.com/reports/3554696)
* [PullRequest](https://github.com/nextcloud/user_oidc/pull/1340)

### For more information

If you have any questions or comments about this advisory:

* Create a post in [nextcloud/security-advisories](https://github.com/nextcloud/security-advisories/discussions)
* Customers: Open a support ticket at [portal.nextcloud.com](https://portal.nextcloud.com)", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-79xf-ffj8-96fm", "html_url": "https://github.com/nextcloud/security-advisories/security/advisories/GHSA-79xf-ffj8-96fm", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-79xf-ffj8-96fm"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-45284"}], "private_fork": null, "published_at": "2026-05-12T09:08:37Z", "publisher": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/84044328?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DorraJaouad/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DorraJaouad/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DorraJaouad/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DorraJaouad/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/DorraJaouad", "id": 84044328, "login": "DorraJaouad", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjg0MDQ0MzI4", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DorraJaouad/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DorraJaouad/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DorraJaouad/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DorraJaouad/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DorraJaouad/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/DorraJaouad", "user_view_type": "public"}, "severity": "medium", "state": "published", "submission": null, "summary": "Wrong condition in the User OIDC app's LdapService allowed deleted LDAP users to authenticate", "updated_at": "2026-05-12T09:08:37Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/repos/nextcloud/security-advisories/security-advisories/GHSA-79xf-ffj8-96fm", "vulnerabilities": [{"package": {"ecosystem": "nextcloud", "name": "User OIDC"}, "patched_versions": "8.4.0", "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 1.3.6, >= 5.0.3, >= 6.1.0, >= 6.3.0, >= 8.0.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Wrong condition in the User OIDC app's LdapService allowed deleted LDAP users to authenticate
